outfit_info.outfit_description: A young boy sports a sophisticated yet casual layered look. He wears a striped shirt under a rich red knit sweater, topped by a warm tan puffer jacket. Black sweatpants and brown boots complete the ensemble, with a classic check jacket casually tied at the waist, blending heritage charm with comfort.

model_attributes.body: A young boy with a slender build, light brown hair, and a composed expression, standing with neat presentation.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands upright, facing directly forward, with a calm, steady gaze. He holds a clipboard casually at his side.
model_attributes.background: A moody, misty landscape features an imposing stone castle, bare autumn trees, and vintage cars on cobblestones.

outfit.P01089929: beige quilted cotton corduroy down jacket
